questions.question: How many unique citation statutes are recorded?
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: single entity, no joins, with aggregation (COUNT/SUM/AVG)
questions.reasoning: The question asks for the count of 'unique citation statutes'. This directly maps to counting distinct instances of the 'CitationStatute' entity type. No filters or joins are needed, making it a Tier 1 query with an aggregation.

questions.question: How many dispositions have a penalty greater than 50000 USD?
questions.reasoning: This query counts the number of Disposition entities. It filters these entities based on their 'disposition_penalty_usd' attribute, selecting only those where the penalty is greater than 50000.0. This fits the T2 criteria of a single entity type with a numeric filter.

questions.question: Find the disposition outcomes that contain the word 'Dismiss'.
questions.expected_answer: Dismiss Pursuant to Prosecutorial Discretion, Dismissed-Other
questions.reasoning: This query retrieves distinct 'disposition_outcome' values for Disposition entities. It uses a `CONTAINS` filter (case-insensitive) on the 'disposition_outcome' attribute to find outcomes that include the word 'Dismiss'. This satisfies the T2 criteria of a single entity type and a string-based filter.

questions.question: For each case, what is the average penalty of its dispositions, considering only dispositions that cite a statute?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?caseName (AVG(xsd:float(?penalty)) AS ?averagePenalty) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement> WHERE {
  ?case <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Case> .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_name> ?caseName .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_has_disposition> ?disposition .
  ?disposition <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Disposition> .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_penalty_usd> ?penalty .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_cites_statute> ?statute .
  ?statute <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/CitationStatute> .
} GROUP BY ?caseName
full_expected_items: Arizona Republicans Who Believe In Treating Others With Respect | 0.0
1199 SEIU United Healthcare Workers East Federal Political Action Fund | 85000.0
Sam Brown PAC f/k/a Sam Brown for Nevada | 0.0
Harris for President (f/k/a Biden for President) | 0.0
Country Over Party PAC (f/k/a Kinzinger for Congress) | 19000.0

questions.reasoning: This query involves three entity types: Case, Disposition, and CitationStatute, connected by Case -> Disposition -> CitationStatute. It calculates an average penalty per case, satisfying the Option A shape requirements for a T4 question with aggregation.

questions.question: What is the average penalty for dispositions that cite a statute, grouped by the case they belong to?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?case_name (AVG(xsd:float(?penalty)) AS ?average_penalty) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement> WHERE {
  ?case <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Case> .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_name> ?case_name .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_has_disposition> ?disposition .
  ?disposition <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Disposition> .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_cites_statute> ?statute .
  ?statute <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/CitationStatute> .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_penalty_usd> ?penalty .
  FILTER(xsd:float(?penalty) > 0)
}
GROUP BY ?case_name
ORDER BY DESC(?average_penalty)
LIMIT 10
full_expected_items: 1199 SEIU United Healthcare Workers East Federal Political Action Fund | 85000.0
questions.expected_answer:
Oklahoma Leadership Council | 174000.0

PA Lawyer Fund | 25000.0
questions.reasoning: This query uses Option A (3+ entity types connected by relationships). It involves three distinct entity types: Case, Disposition, and CitationStatute. The relationships form a path: Case -> Disposition -> CitationStatute. It also includes an aggregation (AVG) and a GROUP BY clause, which are common in T4 questions. All entity variables have `rdf:type` triples.
